summary: Plan-mode inventory classification for open PR shard. No GitHub mutations are planned; merge, fix, instant close, low-signal close, and post-merge closeout are disabled by job frontmatter. Hydrated preflight state covers the first 20 listed PRs; later PRs are classified conservatively with null live timestamps because the compacted artifact did not include hydrated item records.

actions.reason: Useful but broad feature PR needing proof and conflict/review resolution; no close/merge path in plan mode.
Focused provider/channel PR, but proof and review-bot preflight are incomplete; keep for maintainer/channel review.
Substantial feature PR with supplied proof but dirty merge state and waiting-on-author signal; not suitable for close or merge recommendation.
No hydrated live state in the artifact, so keep as independent/non-mutating inventory item.
